{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Sales Advisor",
  "description": "Halliburton Energy Services Nigeria Limited - In the coming decades, energy resources will become increasingly difficult to find and access. As one of the world&#39;s largest providers of products and services to the upstream energy industry, Halliburton serves the life cycle of the well.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Technical Sales Advisor&nbsp;

Requisition Number: 206305&nbsp;&nbsp;
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Description


	We are looking for the right people &mdash; people who want to innovate, achieve, grow and lead.
	We attract and retain the best talent by investing in our employees and empowering them to develop themselves and their careers.
	Experience the challenges, rewards and opportunity of working for one of the world&rsquo;s largest providers of products and services to the global energy industry.


Job Duties


	Under broad direction, utilizes expertise in specific aspects of a Product Service Lines&#39; (PSL) technology and services portfolio to educate Customers, Operations, and Business Development (BD) on features, advantages and benefits of the PSL solution offerings. Under broad direction, the Technical Sales Advisor is accountable for Delivery Execution.
	This entails utilizing a detailed knowledge base of specific sub-PSL products, services, and solutions in order to identify technical needs of customers through product knowledge and geographic understanding of challenges, aid the BD organization in pursuit of work through customer interaction and internal/external workshops, provide technical recommendations to BD for proposal preparation regarding solution up-sell, and aid operations and BD in the diagnosis and communication of solutions delivery issues.
	Technical Sales Advisors help establish the strategic direction in the work area through clear understanding of the local customer&#39;s business drivers and technical challenges and are responsible for identifying and executing up-sell (POP Plan) strategies within a geography of responsibility.
	Maintains an overview of the external market and Halliburton&#39;s marketing strategies by collaborating with the PSL, Region/Country Business Development, Account and Tech Teams to identify opportunities to grow profitable revenue and maintain awareness of the technology available from the PSL.
	Provides input to PSL technology project priorities through the understanding of the market, customer&#39;s needs and technology gaps within the geographic customer base.
	Executes tactical action plans as set by Country management team.
	Must possess thorough understanding of the supported sub-PSL&#39;s technology and broad understanding of the associated development tools.
	Understands and promotes the PSL&#39;s quality directives and ensures that completion or workover operations are performed in a consistent manner in compliance with all HSE and OE policies and best practices.


Requirements


	Requires completion of an undergraduate Degree in Engineering or related disciplines
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in energy services industry, preferably as a field professional.


Compensation
Compensation is competitive and commensurate with experience.",

Technical Sales Advisor Job at Halliburton Energy Services Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Halliburton Energy Services Nigeria Limited - In the coming decades, energy resources will become increasingly difficult to find and access. As one of the world's largest providers of products and services to the upstream energy industry, Halliburton serves the life cycle of the well.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Sales Advisor 

Requisition Number: 206305  
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for the right people — people who want to innovate, achieve, grow and lead.
	We attract and retain the best talent by investing in our employees and empowering them to develop themselves and their careers.
	Experience the challenges, rewards and opportunity of working for one of the world’s largest providers of products and services to the global energy industry.


Job Duties


	Under broad direction, utilizes expertise in specific aspects of a Product Service Lines' (PSL) technology and services portfolio to educate Customers, Operations, and Business Development (BD) on features, advantages and benefits of the PSL solution offerings. Under broad direction, the Technical Sales Advisor is accountable for Delivery Execution.
	This entails utilizing a detailed knowledge base of specific sub-PSL products, services, and solutions in order to identify technical needs of customers through product knowledge and geographic understanding of challenges, aid the BD organization in pursuit of work through customer interaction and internal/external workshops, provide technical recommendations to BD for proposal preparation regarding solution up-sell, and aid operations and BD in the diagnosis and communication of solutions delivery issues.
	Technical Sales Advisors help establish the strategic direction in the work area through clear understanding of the local customer's business drivers and technical challenges and are responsible for identifying and executing up-sell (POP Plan) strategies within a geography of responsibility.
	Maintains an overview of the external market and Halliburton's marketing strategies by collaborating with the PSL, Region/Country Business Development, Account and Tech Teams to identify opportunities to grow profitable revenue and maintain awareness of the technology available from the PSL.
	Provides input to PSL technology project priorities through the understanding of the market, customer's needs and technology gaps within the geographic customer base.
	Executes tactical action plans as set by Country management team.
	Must possess thorough understanding of the supported sub-PSL's technology and broad understanding of the associated development tools.
	Understands and promotes the PSL's quality directives and ensures that completion or workover operations are performed in a consistent manner in compliance with all HSE and OE policies and best practices.


Requirements


	Requires completion of an undergraduate Degree in Engineering or related disciplines
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in energy services industry, preferably as a field professional.


Compensation
Compensation is competitive and commensurate with experience.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities of an IT Support Assistant


	Technical Support:&nbsp;Resolves user issues with software, hardware, and networks (e.g., printers, laptops, VPN, and email problems) via walk-ins, email, or remote tools.
	Hardware and Software Setup:&nbsp;Installs, configures, and updates workstations, operating systems, and applications for employees.
	Maintenance &amp; Security:&nbsp;Monitors systems to ensure proper function, applies security patches, updates antivirus software, and maintains inventory of equipment.
	Account Administration:&nbsp;Creates, updates, and manages user accounts, permissions, and security settings.
	Documentation &amp; Training:&nbsp;Creates, updates, and maintains documentation, technical guides, or FAQs for hardware/software use.
	IT Infrastructure Support:&nbsp;Assists in organizing and maintaining the server room or network infrastructure, including troubleshooting connectivity.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and work experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;johngate1234hr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Proximity will be given to applicants living within and around Alakija environs.",

IT Support Assistant Job at Johngate Industrial Company Limited




        
    

        
        Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support Assistant

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities of an IT Support Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Technical Support: Resolves user issues with software, hardware, and networks (e.g., printers, laptops, VPN, and email problems) via walk-ins, email, or remote tools.
	Hardware and Software Setup: Installs, configures, and updates workstations, operating systems, and applications for employees.
	Maintenance & Security: Monitors systems to ensure proper function, applies security patches, updates antivirus software, and maintains inventory of equipment.
	Account Administration: Creates, updates, and manages user accounts, permissions, and security settings.
	Documentation & Training: Creates, updates, and maintains documentation, technical guides, or FAQs for hardware/software use.
	IT Infrastructure Support: Assists in organizing and maintaining the server room or network infrastructure, including troubleshooting connectivity.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and work experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Proximity will be given to applicants living within and around Alakija environs.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;johngate1234hr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Store Officer Job at Johngate Industrial Company Limited




        
    

        
        Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Store Officer

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
You will be responsible for:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Receiving, inspecting, and recording all incoming goods.
	Proper storage and arrangement of stock items.
	Issuing items to departments based on approved requisitions.
	Maintaining accurate stock cards, bin cards, and system records.
	Conducting routine stock counts and reconciling variances.
	Monitoring stock levels and notifying management of shortages.
	Preventing stock losses through effective control measures.
	Preparing daily/weekly stock and variance reports.
	Ensuring proper documentation and compliance with inventory policies.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc in Business Administration, Accounting, or related field.
	Proven experience as a Store or Inventory Officer.
	Proficiency in QuickBooks is mandatory.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management practices.
	Good numerical and record-keeping skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Priority will be given to applicants living very close to Alakija and its environs.

  "description": "DualCore Careers is a recruitment and career support company dedicated to connecting employers with highly skilled remote and on-site professionals. We help businesses find the right talent while also empowering job seekers through CV optimization, LinkedIn enhancement, and career development services. Our goal is to bridge the gap between great talent and great opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile Content Creator
Job Location:&nbsp;Ebute Meta, Mainland - Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (Hybrid &ndash; 3 times weekly on-site)
Duration: 1 month

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative and proactive Mobile Content Creator to develop engaging content around an ongoing renovation project.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging video and photo content showcasing renovation progress
	Develop content that highlights the firm&rsquo;s work and brand
	Post content daily across designated platforms


Requirement


	Must be able to shoot and edit content using a mobile device.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cv, portfolio and cover letter to:&nbsp;dualcorecareers@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates must live on the mainland.",

Mobile Content Creator Job at DualCore Careers




        
    

        
        DualCore Careers is a recruitment and career support company dedicated to connecting employers with highly skilled remote and on-site professionals. We help businesses find the right talent while also empowering job seekers through CV optimization, LinkedIn enhancement, and career development services. Our goal is to bridge the gap between great talent and great opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile Content Creator
Job Location: Ebute Meta, Mainland - Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (Hybrid – 3 times weekly on-site)
Duration: 1 month

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a creative and proactive Mobile Content Creator to develop engaging content around an ongoing renovation project.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging video and photo content showcasing renovation progress
	Develop content that highlights the firm’s work and brand
	Post content daily across designated platforms


Requirement


	Must be able to shoot and edit content using a mobile device.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cv, portfolio and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates must live on the mainland.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Maintenance Expert",
  "description": "VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria&rsquo;s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.

Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company&rsquo;s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Expert
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

&nbsp;Responsibilities&nbsp;


	The position is primarily responsible for the maintenance and repair of all mechanical equipment involved in the production and operation of a beverage company, ensuring the safe and stable operation of the production line.
	Applicants must be able to independently carry out equipment inspections, parts replacement, troubleshooting, and repairs.
	Familiarity with mechanical structures and related standards is required, along with solid technical skills and extensive practical experience.


Requirements


	One professional mechanical maintenance worker with more than five years of relevant work experience.


Salary
N300,000 - N600,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vijutalent@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Maintenance Expert Job at Viju Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria’s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company’s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Expert
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

 Responsibilities 


	The position is primarily responsible for the maintenance and repair of all mechanical equipment involved in the production and operation of a beverage company, ensuring the safe and stable operation of the production line.
	Applicants must be able to independently carry out equipment inspections, parts replacement, troubleshooting, and repairs.
	Familiarity with mechanical structures and related standards is required, along with solid technical skills and extensive practical experience.


Requirements


	One professional mechanical maintenance worker with more than five years of relevant work experience.
